Before_meal_N.description: Resting metabolic rate (kcal/min) before meal under Normal diet for subjects 1-5. Same subjects as Before_meal_O, After_meal_N, and After_meal_O.

After_meal_N.description: Resting metabolic rate (kcal/min) after meal under Normal diet for subjects 1-5. Same subjects as Before_meal_N, Before_meal_O, and After_meal_O.

Before_meal_O.description: Resting metabolic rate (kcal/min) before meal under Overfed diet for subjects 1-5. Same subjects as Before_meal_N, After_meal_N, and After_meal_O.

After_meal_O.description: Resting metabolic rate (kcal/min) after meal under Overfed diet for subjects 1-5. Same subjects as Before_meal_N, After_meal_N, and Before_meal_O.

Subject.description: Subject identifier used for pairing observations across the two diets in the paired t-test.
